item.label: Fix generic error handling in CLI
item.summary: Implement structured error handling with suggestions

body: Generic error handling in channels/cli/main.py at lines 137-139. The ValueError catch block returns raw error message without structured error and suggestion, violating standard-0010 (MCP Server Development). Replace with AudiaGenticError that includes: 1) Error code identifying the issue, 2) Descriptive error message, 3) Recovery guidance with specific steps, 4) Suggested commands to fix the issue. Follow pattern from state_machine.py:28-43 and records.py:93-100 which use structured error classes. Ensure all errors returned from CLI handlers include recovery guidance. Document error handling behavior and provide examples of valid vs invalid inputs that trigger this error. Test that error output is machine-parseable and provides actionable recovery steps. Verify error messages are user-friendly while including technical details for debugging. Ensure all caught exceptions are converted to structured AudiaGenticError format with suggestions.
